command:
set -euo pipefail
whoami
pwd
ls -la /home/node/.openclaw
ls -la /home/node/.openclaw/state || true
find /home/node/.openclaw/state -maxdepth 3 -type f -printf '%p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 200

bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
whoami
pwd
ls -la /home/node/.openclaw
ls -la /home/node/.openclaw/state || true
find /home/node/.openclaw/state -maxdepth 4 -type f -printf "%p\n" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 200
'

bash -lc 'openclaw --version 2>/dev/null || true
openclaw help 2>/dev/null || true
openclaw gateway status 2>/dev/null || true
'

bash -lc 'openclaw status 2>/dev/null || true
openclaw health 2>/dev/null || true
openclaw skills list 2>/dev/null || true
'
